intended_use: The uMR Omega system is indicated for use as a magnetic resonance diagnostic device (MRDD) that produces sagittal, transverse, coronal, and oblique cross sectional images, and spectroscopic images, an
intended_use_full: The uMR Omega system is indicated for use as a magnetic resonance diagnostic device (MRDD) that produces sagittal, transverse, coronal, and oblique cross sectional images, and spectroscopic images, and that display internal anatomical structure and/or function of the head, body and extremities. These images and the physical parameters derived from the images when interpreted by a trained physician yield information that may assist the diagnosis. Contrast agents may be used depending on the region of interest of the scan.
ground_truth: Multiple-averaged high-resolution high-SNR images as ground truth for DeepRecon training; radiologist evaluation by American Board of Radiologists certificated physicians for clinical quality assessment
other_metrics: Image SNR: DeepRecon 302.48±0.78 vs NADR 209.41±1.08 (PASS); Image uniformity difference: 0.15% (PASS); Image contrast intensity difference: 0.9% (PASS); Structure measurement difference: 0% (PASS)
